title: The Rescue Force Regroups
description: The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Blueno, Zoro, Franky, Nami. The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We've been pulled back to them _____

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That smokescreen was a pretty lame idea.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: So, it was useless after all.

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: Sogeking!!! Guard Nico Robin with your life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Don't kill the straw hat pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: It's time to push them apart again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: WAA!! Wait a sec, Nico Robin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: How many times must I tell you!?

summary: The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.
